properties.text: A severe thunderstorm moving northeast toward Valence is producing intense rainfall, frequent lightning, and a powerful convective core with reflectivity repeatedly reaching 62–65 dBZ. The storm remains well‑organized and continues advancing toward the lower Rhône valley with severe hazards possible along its path.
